name: Curse
description: You target a creature within a short (10 unit) distance and place a curse on them if your spell check beats the target's resilience. While you concentrate on this spell, make a spell check against their resilience at the start of each of their turns if they are still within a moderate (20 unit) range. On success, they take 5 dark damage.
charge: Deal 7 initial dark damage if the spell succeeds.
